task_summary: Implement FlowBot OpenSpec + FlowGuard headless MVP through demo
trigger_reason: FlowBot runtime has stateful Router/Controller/PM/Worker workflow, route synthesis, evidence review, and completion gates.
commands_run: python scripts/run_flowbot_demo.py --request "用 FlowBot 把这个复杂请求整理成模型优先路线，并生成一个可验收的最终报告。"
findings: Protocol model catches cancel creating a run, Controller planning, dispatch before accepted route, accepting route without model artifacts, PM pass without evidence, and done after reject.
Route synthesis model catches linear route without topology, route package without model artifacts, and acceptance contracts before route.
Demo run run-20260514-135153 reached Router status DONE.
skipped_steps: Full desktop UI and real background-agent adapters are intentionally out of MVP scope.
next_actions: Replace deterministic PM/Worker demo classes with real background-agent adapters.
Expand repair, pause, and needs-user paths with runtime tests and FlowGuard scenarios.

task_summary: Connect FlowPilot-cut native startup intake to FlowBot runtime
trigger_reason: The startup intake creates the first confirmed/cancelled FlowBot boundary and must preserve cancel-before-run and model-backed runtime completion.
commands_run: python scripts/run_flowbot_demo.py --request "用 FlowBot 跑一次最终 native UI 接入后的基线 demo。"
findings: Headless cancel records cancelled intake without creating a run.
Headless confirm writes FlowBot intake artifacts, invokes runtime from the confirmed intake, and reaches DONE in run-20260514-141449.
OpenSpec remained on the original flowbot-model-first-runtime change; no Web/API/Workbench plan is included.
skipped_steps: Visible manual UI click was not automated; headless confirm/cancel covered the same script paths except user mouse interaction.
Real PM/Worker background-agent adapters remain out of this MVP.
next_actions: Use the native startup intake command for manual product trials.
Keep future UI work inside the locked FlowPilot startup-intake shape unless the user explicitly approves a new OpenSpec change.

task_summary: Install FlowBot as local Codex skill and create initial version baseline
trigger_reason: Skill install, version recording, git init, initial commit, and tag are ordered side effects that need validation before completion is claimed.
findings: Installed skill content matches repository source skills/flowbot/SKILL.md.
FlowGuard install/release model catches installed-without-source, validated-before-install, commit-without-version, commit-tracks-outputs, tag-before-commit, and claimed-before-tag hazards.
skipped_steps: No remote publish or GitHub release was requested.
next_actions: Create initial local git commit and tag v0.1.0.
Use check_flowbot_skill_install.py after future skill edits to prevent stale installed skill content.
